The tournament has been organized by '''[https://www.krafton.com/en/ KRAFTON]''' and is sponsored by '''[https://www.iqoo.com/ iQOO]''' and features a total prize pool of ₹1,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |b1=AnkiiiBOT|b1name=|b1flag=in |b2=Ocean |b2link=Ocean (Caster) |b3=Mazy }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |b1=Spero|b1name=Piyush Bathla|b1flag=in |b2=fLoki|b2name=Heeraka Thakor|b2flag=in |b3=Experiment }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021:''' 4th December 2021 to 16th January 2022'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] * '''''In-game Qualifiers:''' 4th December 2021 to 8th December 2021'' ** Open for all ** In-game qualifiers will be held to determine the contenders for the online qualifiers. ** Every registered squad will be required to play 15 matches, out of which 10 best games will be taken into consideration for qualification. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''Top 1024 teams}} advance to '''''Online-Qualifiers''''' * '''''Online-Qualifiers:''' 16th December 2021 to 30th December 2021'' ** '''''1024 Teams''''' ** The Online-Qualifiers qualifiers have been divided into three rounds (Round 1, 2 and 3) ** 32 teams will be invited for Round 3. ** 2 matches will be played in Round 1 & 2 and multiple teams will be eliminated with each round. ** 3 matches will be played in Round 3 and multiple teams will be eliminated. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''64 teams}} advance to '''''Quarter-Finals''''' * '''''Quarter-Finals:''' 2nd January 2022 to 5th January 2022'' ** '''''64 Teams''''' ** These 64 teams will be divided into 4 groups ** Each group will play a total of 6 matches ** Top 6 teams from each group will qualify for the '''''Semi-Finals'''''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''24 teams}} advance to '''''Semi-Finals''''' * '''''Semi-Finals:''' 7th January 2022 to 10th January 2022'' ** '''''24 Teams''''' ** These 24 teams will be divided into 3 groups ** The groups will face off against each other in a Round-Robin format. ** Each group will play a total of 8 Round Robins. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''16 teams}} advance to '''''Grand-Finals''''' * '''''Grand Finals:''' 13th January 2022 to 16th January 2022'' ** '''''16 Teams''''' ** 24 matches to be played over a period of 4 days to determine the winner. ====Allocations==== * {{Bgcolortext|up|'''''Winner'''''}} qualified for '''[[PUBG_Mobile_Global_Championship/2021|PMGC 2021 - Grand Finals]]''' ''*In order to compete in the '''PMGC 2021 - Grand Finals''', teams needed to submit travel documents by January 16th, 2022.
As a result, '''[[GodLike Esports]]''' secures the spot as the team with the highest rank and holds all the travel requirements. {{cite web|title=👏Please welcome GodLike Esports as the final team to compete at the PMGC Grand Finals 2021🔥!|author=PUBG Mobile Esports|url=https://www.facebook.com/PUBGMESPORTSOFFICIAL/posts/726784275394619}} ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=finish}} ===Prize Pool=== ₹1,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( ≃ $134,310 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams as seen below:

September 3rd, 2023 ** 2048 Teams from in-game qualifiers. ** Teams divided into 128 groups with 16 squads in each group. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 3 teams}} from each group + {{bgcolortext|up|96 high ranked teams}} (Total 480 teams) will advance to ''Round 2''. * '''''Round 2''' : September 7th - 10th, 2023 ** 512 Teams. ** 480 Teams from Round 1 + Bottom 32 teams from ''The Grind week 5. ** Teams are divided into 32 groups with 16 squads in each group. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 7 teams}} from each group (Total 224 teams) advance to ''Round 3''. * '''''Round 3''' : September 14th - 17th, 2023 ** 256 Teams. ** 224 teams from ''Round-2'' + Top 32 teams from The grind ''week-5'' will be divided into 16 groups. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 64 teams) advance to ''Round 4''. ** {{bgcolortext|stay|Teams ranked (65th-80th)}} (Total 16 teams) advance to additional stage called ''Losers Bracket''. * '''''Quarter Finals/Round 4''' : September 21st - 24th, 2023 ** 64 Teams from ''Round 3. ** Teams will be divided into 4 groups. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 16 teams) advance to ''Semi Finals. ** {{bgcolortext|stay|Remaining 48 teams}} advance to ''Losers Bracket''. * '''''Losers Bracket''' : September 28th - October 1st, 2023 ** 64 Teams. ** 16 teams from ''Round 3'' and 48 teams from ''Quarter Finals/Round 4''. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 16 teams) advance to the ''Semi Finals''. * '''''Semi Finals''' : October 4th - 7th, 2023 ** 32 teams. ** 16 teams from ''Quarter Finals/Round 4'' and 16 teams from ''Losers Bracket''. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} advance to the ''Grand Finals''. * '''''The Grand Finals''' : October 12th - 13th and 15th, 2023 at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Indoor Stadium , {{Flag|in}} Mumbai ** 16 teams from ''Semi Finals. ** 3 match days. ** 18 matches '''Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2024''' or '''BGIS 2024''' is the third edition of ''[[Battlegrounds Mobile India Series|Battlegrounds Mobile India Series]]''. The tournament is organized by '''[https://www.krafton.com/en/ KRAFTON]''' and features a total prize pool of ₹2,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

===Format===
* '''League Stage:''''' May 2nd - June 16th, 2024
**{{TextDropdown|title=For League Stage format|section=LeagueStage|width=max-content}}
* '''Round 1:''''' May 2nd - 5th, 2024
** 1024 Teams from in-game qualifiers.
** Teams divided into 64 groups with 16 squads in each group.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 7 teams}} from each group + {{bgcolortext|up|Top 32}} among the remaining teams (Total 480 teams) qualify for ''Round 2.

* '''Round 2:''''' May 9th - 12th, 2024
** 512 Teams, 4 match days.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|480 teams}} from Round 1.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|32 teams}} (33rd to 64th ranked) from The Grind.
** Teams are divided into 32 groups with 16 squads in each group.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 7 teams}} from each group + {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} among the remaining teams (Total 240 teams) qualify for ''Round 3.

* '''Round 3:''''' May 16th - 19th, 2024
** 256 Teams, 4 match days.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|240 teams}} from Round 2.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|16 teams}} (17th-32nd ranked) from The Grind.
** Teams are divided into 16 groups with 16 squads in each group.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 3 teams}} from each group (Total 48 teams) qualify for ''Round 4
** {{bgcolortext|stay|Top 16 teams}} among the remaining teams advance to ''Wildcard Entry''.

* '''Round 4:''''' May 23rd - 26th, 2024
** 64 Teams, 4 match days.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|48 teams}} from Round 3.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|16 teams}} (1st-16th ranked) from The Grind.
** Teams will be divided into 4 groups.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 16 teams) advance to ''Semi Finals Week 1''.
** {{bgcolortext|stay|Remaining 48 teams}} advance to ''Wildcard Entry''.

* '''Wildcard Entry:''''' May 30th - June 2nd, 2024
** 64 Teams, 4 match days.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|16 teams}} from Round 3.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|48 teams}} from Round 4.
** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16.
** Each group will play 3 matches in 2 days.
** After 2 days, Based on the overall standings teams are shuffled.
** Again, each group will play 3 matches for next 2 days.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} based on the cumulative overall standings advance to the ''Semi Finals Week 1''.

* '''Semi Finals Week 1:''''' June 6th - 9th, 2024
** 32 teams, 4 match days.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|16 teams}} from Round 4.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|16 teams}} from Wildcard Entry.
** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 8 teams.
** Round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to the ''Grand Finals''.
** {{bgcolortext|stay|Remaining 24 teams}} proceed to ''Semi Finals Week 2''.

* '''Semi Finals Week 2:''''' June 13th - 16th, 2024
** 24 teams, 4 match days.
** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8.
** Double Round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to the ''Grand Finals''.
{{TextDropdown|end}}

* '''The Grand Finals:''''' June 28th - 30th, 2024 at Hitex Exhibition Center, {{Flag|in}} Hyderabad
** 16 teams, 3 matchdays.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|8 teams}} from Semi Finals Week 1.
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|8 teams}} from Semi Finals Week 2.
** 18 matches (6 each day).
*** Map Order : ''Erangel >> Miramar >> Sanhok >> Vikendi >> Miramar >> Erangel

Sept 18th, 2024 ** 128 teams ** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}} **{{TextDropdown|title=For League Stage format|section=LeagueStage|width=max-content}} * '''Round 1:''''' Aug 20th - 27th & 29th - Sept 5th ** 128 teams, 16 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into two groups (Red and Blue). ** Each group is divided into 4 sub-groups of 16 teams each. ** Each group plays 6 matches per week. *** Group Blue for first 4 days and 4 days from 29th Aug. ** Groups are reshuffled after first week. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 64 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Round 2. * '''Round 2:''''' Sept 7th - 10th ** 64 teams, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 4 groups of 16 teams each. ** Each team plays 6 matches. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 48 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Round 3. * '''Round 3:''''' Sept 11th - 14th ** 48 teams, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 16 teams each. ** Groups are reshuffled after 2 days. ** Each team plays a total of 8 matches. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 24 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Semi Finals. * '''Semi Finals:''''' Sept 15th - 18th, 2024 ** 24 teams, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Double Round-robin format. ** Each team plays a total of 16 matches (4/day). ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Grand Finals.{{TextDropdown|end}}
* '''Grand Finals:''''' Sept 27th - 29th, 2024 at Adlux International Convention Centre, {{Flag|in}} Kochi. ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ===Points System=== {{PUBGM 2023 * '''Quarter Finals:''''' November 8th - 10th, 2024 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches in 3 days. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 team from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' November 11th - 13th, 2024 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Each group will play 12 matches in 3 days. ** Round-robin format. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals.
